parameters.message:
=🎬 **Your video is ready!**

👉 Please review it carefully and approve it.
✅ Once approved, it will be uploaded to **YouTube** and **Reels**.

🔗 Video Link: {{ $('Video Ready Webhook').item.json.body.video_url }}

parameters.text: Reel is Publishing and youtube video making public.

❌ **Video Rejected**  No worries! You rejected the video, so it will **not be uploaded** to YouTube or Reels.  🔄 You can start building a new video anytime — just follow the same process again.  Let’s create something even better 🚀
✅ **Video Approved**  Great choice! Your video has been approved and is now being uploaded to **YouTube** and **Reels**.  🚀 Sit back and relax — your content is on its way!

=📹 **Here is your video list:**

{{ $json.result }}

✍️ Review the videos and type **“publish”** to publish the video.
🚀 Once you send it, the video will be published automatically.

nodes.name: Set Video & Caption for food video

parameters.text: =⚠️ Duplicate webhook blocked. story_id={{ $('Validate Webhook Payload').item.json.body.story_id }} is already in flight (lock:video held).

parameters.content:
## Workflow 1: Ingestion & Approval

- Validate payload (story_id, video_url, video_type)
- Acquire lock:video:<story_id> (NX, 3600s)
- Telegram approval
- Download video
- Upload YouTube as PRIVATE
- Push metadata to queue:publish:<videoType>

**Halts on:** duplicate lock, missing fields, invalid videoType.

nodes.name: WF1 — Ingestion + Validate + Lock + Approval + Private Upload

parameters.content:
## Workflow 2: object_talking Publish

Allowed channels:
- YouTube: KYA HO AGAR, cute little elephant
- Instagram: CHIZO KI KAHANI

Trigger: Telegram cmd `publish object`
Releases lock at end via 'Release Lock (object_talking)'.

## Workflow 3: food_discovery Publish

Allowed channels:
- YouTube: CHIZO KI KAHANI, Nutritoon
- Instagram: KYA HO AGAR

Trigger: Telegram cmd `publish food`
Releases lock at end via 'Release Lock (food_discovery)'.

## Workflow 4: Memory + Scripts

Queues:
- queue:script:object_talking
- queue:script:food_discovery

Webhooks for object/food script storage and retrieval; Postgres for memory.

## ✓ Instagram routing resolved

- `Create Reel Container` → `17841445298218124` → **CHIZO KI KAHANI** → object_talking
- `Create Reel Container1` → `17841454553831084` → **KYA HO AGAR** → food_discovery

Switch[0] (food_discovery) → Create Reel Container1 only.
Switch[1] (object_talking) → Create Reel Container only.

## ✓ Upload routing finalized

**object_talking** (If TRUE) → 2 YouTube uploads:
- cute little elephant
- KYA HO AGAR Object Youtube

**food_discovery** (If FALSE) → 2 YouTube uploads:
- CHIZO KI KAHANI Youtube
- Nutritoon

Both branches fan in via per-branch Merge → shared Aggregate → Queue Router → correct Redis queue.

nodes.name: ✓ Upload-stage routing — 2 channels per content type
Set Video & Caption for story kya ho agar

parameters.content:
## Fetch food_discovery jobs

Webhook path `/webhook/8f08ec11-d1ad-45d8-ae8f-4f9c37f72612` is now a **READ** endpoint that RPOPs from `queue:script:food_discovery` and returns the value via `Respond to Webhook4`.

Python's `FOOD_DISCOVERY_JOB_FETCH_URL` (app/config.py) points here.

**Note:** Previously this path LPUSHed to the same queue. If you need to RESTORE the store endpoint, give it a new path (e.g. spawn a new webhook node) — `store food video script to redis` is still present in the workflow but unwired.
